title: Milk livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Milk livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for milking

pcs.text: Identify and confirm milking tasks, associated workplace procedures, health and safety, hygiene and food safety hazards, standards, personal protective equipment (PPE) and practices with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm milking tasks, associated workplace procedures, health and safety, hygiene and food safety hazards, standards, personal protective equipment (PPE) and practices with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm milking tasks, associated workplace procedures, health and safety, hygiene and food safety hazards, standards, personal protective equipment (PPE) and practices with supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare self, dairy sheds, yards, machinery and equipment used for milking operations according to work health and safety, hygiene and food safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare self, dairy sheds, yards, machinery and equipment used for milking operations according to work health and safety, hygiene and food safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare self, dairy sheds, yards, machinery and equipment used for milking operations according to work health and safety, hygiene and food safety requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm cleanliness of milk storage tank according to hygiene and food safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm cleanliness of milk storage tank according to hygiene and food safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm cleanliness of milk storage tank according to hygiene and food safety requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare and check teat spray applicators according to manufacturer specifications or animal health professional advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and check teat spray applicators according to manufacturer specifications or animal health professional advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and check teat spray applicators according to manufacturer specifications or animal health professional advice.

pcs.text: Move and yard livestock in readiness for milking operations according to animal welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move and yard livestock in readiness for milking operations according to animal welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move and yard livestock in readiness for milking operations according to animal welfare requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for milking

elements.title: Carry out milking

pcs.text: Assist livestock to move carefully and calmly into position according to animal welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist livestock to move carefully and calmly into position according to animal welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist livestock to move carefully and calmly into position according to animal welfare requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor livestock health and condition, and segregate and report livestock health problems and conditions as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock health and condition, and segregate and report livestock health problems and conditions as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock health and condition, and segregate and report livestock health problems and conditions as required.

pcs.text: Conduct milking according to food safety requirements and monitor progress to prevent over-milking
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct milking according to food safety requirements and monitor progress to prevent over-milking?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct milking according to food safety requirements and monitor progress to prevent over-milking.

pcs.text: Check milk temperature and functionality of cooling equipment according to food safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check milk temperature and functionality of cooling equipment according to food safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check milk temperature and functionality of cooling equipment according to food safety requirements.

pcs.text: Segregate and report livestock producing milk unsuitable for bulk sales as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Segregate and report livestock producing milk unsuitable for bulk sales as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Segregate and report livestock producing milk unsuitable for bulk sales as required.

pcs.text: Identify and isolate unsuitable milk from bulk supplies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and isolate unsuitable milk from bulk supplies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and isolate unsuitable milk from bulk supplies.

pcs.text: Identify equipment faults during milking and repair minor malfunctions or report complex faults immediately to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify equipment faults during milking and repair minor malfunctions or report complex faults immediately to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify equipment faults during milking and repair minor malfunctions or report complex faults immediately to supervisor.

pcs.text: Apply teat disinfection to livestock teats according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply teat disinfection to livestock teats according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply teat disinfection to livestock teats according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out milking

elements.title: Complete milking operation

pcs.text: Return livestock to designated feeding area without causing stress or injury
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return livestock to designated feeding area without causing stress or injury?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return livestock to designated feeding area without causing stress or injury.

pcs.text: Carry out cleaning procedures of dairy facilities, machinery and equipment according to hygiene and food safety and work health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out cleaning procedures of dairy facilities, machinery and equipment according to hygiene and food safety and work health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out cleaning procedures of dairy facilities, machinery and equipment according to hygiene and food safety and work health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to workplace and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to workplace and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to workplace and environmental requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and report machinery, equipment and plant wash malfunctions for repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report machinery, equipment and plant wash malfunctions for repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report machinery, equipment and plant wash malfunctions for repair or replacement.

pcs.text: Monitor levels of consumable equipment used in the milking process and report replacement needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor levels of consumable equipment used in the milking process and report replacement needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor levels of consumable equipment used in the milking process and report replacement needs.

pcs.text: Complete records according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete milking operation

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
